care.summary: Delicate, feathery vine with needle-like leaves; often grown as a hanging or tabletop plant.
care.light: Bright indirect; tolerates some direct morning sun
care.water: Keep evenly moist; do not let dry out completely
care.fertilizer: Monthly with balanced liquid fertilizer during growing season
care.toxicity: Mildly toxic if ingested; may cause skin irritation
common_issues: Yellowing needles from too much direct sun
tips: Mist regularly to maintain humidity and keep foliage fresh
Prune back leggy stems to encourage bushier growth
Best in a hanging basket where feathery fronds can cascade
